description: Returns the details for a specified Custom Field Lov Entry

parameters.name: custom_field_definition_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Custom Field Definition.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the Custom Field List of Values (LOV) Entry.

position.description: Position is sorted descending, highest position is visually the top of the list.

active.description: Whether or not the Custom Field Lov Entry is active
